implemented_changes: Expanded FeatureDepthRecommendation with gate, evidence_required, estimated_minutes, continuation_command, and stop_condition fields.
Added ValidateFeatureDepthRecommendations to reject shallow recommendation lists, duplicate ids, missing concrete fields, and under-budget estimates.
Added 20 explicit Feature Depth seeds before generated continuation nodes.
Wired final synthesis and production-readiness smoke to enforce the concrete recommendation contract.
